objective: Plan immutable semantic releases, overlays, crosswalks, mapping decisions, provenance assertions, recipes, action contracts, and oracle-enforced runtime crossings.
falsifiable_claim: Semantic mappings remain versioned, uncertain, and challengeable and cannot grant execution authority; effects cross the selected tool, policy, authority, and oracle enforcement points.
exit_criteria: Immutable successor and exact semantic tuple tests pass while loss, uncertainty, and contradiction remain visible.
Semantic mapping grants no authority and each effect crosses tool, policy, authority, and oracle PEPs with receipts.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M7_SEMANTIC_DEFINITION_ACTION_PLANE_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Mutate version predecessor, overlay scope, crosswalk loss, mapping confidence, provenance time/source, recipe or connector release, action contract, oracle evidence, and authority context.
remaining_nonclaims: No global ontology or cross-System cooperation.
Semantic compatibility is not correctness, authority, acceptance, or stage closure.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
